strict_win_deltas.delta: P2 validates into a separate normalized wave structure, while P1 validates then deep-clones the original input solely to avoid its allocator mutating it.

P2 rejects non-finite distances and priorities with Number.isFinite and restricts submitted_at to ISO date/timestamp forms, whereas P1 accepts any number including NaN/Infinity and numeric submitted_at values.
P2's readInputPath requires exactly --input PATH, whereas P1 locates --input anywhere in argv and silently permits unrelated extra arguments.
P2 centralizes validation in named requireNonEmptyString, requirePositiveInteger, requireNumber, and parseSubmittedAt helpers, while P1 spreads weaker inline type checks through validateInput.
